commandsRun.command: mkdir -p "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/single" "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/batch/nested" && say -o "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/single/alpha.aiff" "Hello this is transcription validation clip alpha." && ffmpeg -y -loglevel error -f lavfi -i color=c=black:s=320x240:d=6 -i "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/single/alpha.aiff" -c:v libx264 -c:a aac -shortest "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/single/alpha.mp4" && say -o "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/batch/beta.aiff" "Beta clip includes spoken words for batch transcription test." && ffmpeg -y -loglevel error -f lavfi -i color=c=blue:s=320x240:d=6 -i "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/batch/beta.aiff" -c:v libx264 -c:a aac -shortest "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/batch/beta.mp4" && say -o "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/batch/nested/gamma.aiff" "Gamma clip is inside nested folder for recursive discovery." && ffmpeg -y -loglevel error -f lavfi -i color=c=green:s=320x240:d=6 -i "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/batch/nested/gamma.aiff" -c:v libx264 -c:a aac -shortest "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/trans-a/videos/batch/nested/gamma.mov" > "/Users/sdawka/.factory/missions/7ede5099-a0c6-4479-99e9-87a13afef6d2/evidence/core-pipeline/trans-a/fixture-generation.log" 2>&1

commandsRun.note: Inline script parsed transcription JSONs and validated segment ordering/durations and filename convention.

assertionResults.title: Discover Video Files in a Target Folder

steps.action: Run transcribe on batch folder with recursive content
steps.expected: CLI lists discovered files with count and names before processing
steps.observed: Output shows 'Found 2 video file(s): beta.mp4, gamma.mov' then transcribing steps.

assertionResults.title: Transcribe a Single Video File With Segment Timestamps

steps.action: Run transcribe on folder containing only alpha.mp4
steps.expected: Command succeeds and writes JSON with segments containing start/end/text
steps.observed: Summary reports 1 succeeded; alpha_5b2bb9b2.json contains segment with start=0.0, end=2.6, non-empty text.

steps.action: Run transcribe on batch folder containing beta.mp4 and nested/gamma.mov
steps.expected: CLI transcribes each file, prints per-file progress, and summary
steps.observed: Output includes Transcribing 1/2 and 2/2 lines and Summary: 2 succeeded. Both JSON outputs created.

assertionResults.title: Segment Timestamps Are Chronologically Ordered and Valid

steps.action: Parse all generated transcription JSON files and validate segment ordering and duration constraints
steps.expected: Each segment has start < end and non-decreasing start order
steps.observed: Validation report shows allSegmentsChronological=true and allSegmentsHavePositiveDuration=true for all files.

assertionResults.title: Transcription Output Stored as Valid JSON

steps.action: Check generated transcription files on disk and JSON parse them
steps.observed: alpha_5b2bb9b2.json, beta_8407e79f.json, gamma_a7d05761.json exist and allJsonParseable=true.

steps.action: Compare source video basenames to transcription JSON filenames
steps.expected: Consistent, predictable name pattern based on source filename
steps.observed: Files follow stem_hash.json convention: alpha_5b2bb9b2.json, beta_8407e79f.json, gamma_a7d05761.json.

frictions.description: CLI entry point/dependencies were not initially runnable in system environment (snipsnap not in PATH, and system python lacked click).
frictions.resolution: Created an isolated venv under assigned sandbox and installed editable project there before running validations.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions (VAL-TRANS-001..006): 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
